## Meeting Purpose

[Catch up discussion between Marcel Santilli from fwd.digital and John Waldmann from Homebase regarding potential consulting work using AI/ML capabilities.](https://fathom.video/share/kFsStDpaaa6iJb7751SdBXL8nvoV-iiB?tab=summary&timestamp=1.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Homebase recently hired a new CMO and is excited about the addition](https://fathom.video/share/kFsStDpaaa6iJb7751SdBXL8nvoV-iiB?tab=summary&timestamp=7.0)
  - [Marcel's company is focused on enabling companies to adapt AI/ML workflows rather than just providing tools](https://fathom.video/share/kFsStDpaaa6iJb7751SdBXL8nvoV-iiB?tab=summary&timestamp=500.0)
  - [John is interested in leveraging AI/ML for revenue-generating use cases vs just efficiency/productivity](https://fathom.video/share/kFsStDpaaa6iJb7751SdBXL8nvoV-iiB?tab=summary&timestamp=673.0)
  - [They discussed potentially starting with one new work stream in addition to the existing content marketing work stream](https://fathom.video/share/kFsStDpaaa6iJb7751SdBXL8nvoV-iiB?tab=summary&timestamp=1160.0)
  - [Marcel will summarize the proposed work stream options for John to discuss priorities with his co-founder Rishi](https://fathom.video/share/kFsStDpaaa6iJb7751SdBXL8nvoV-iiB?tab=summary&timestamp=1365.0)

## Topics

### New CMO at Homebase

  - [Homebase hired a new CMO, Katie Dare, who has experience from Caviar/DoorDash](https://fathom.video/share/kFsStDpaaa6iJb7751SdBXL8nvoV-iiB?tab=summary&timestamp=60.0)
  - [John is excited about the new hire](https://fathom.video/share/kFsStDpaaa6iJb7751SdBXL8nvoV-iiB?tab=summary&timestamp=284.0)

### AI/ML Consulting Approach

  - [Marcel's company takes an enablement approach vs just providing AI/ML tools](https://fathom.video/share/kFsStDpaaa6iJb7751SdBXL8nvoV-iiB?tab=summary&timestamp=1013.0)
  - [Their focus is on adapting workflows and prompting/processing for a client's specific needs](https://fathom.video/share/kFsStDpaaa6iJb7751SdBXL8nvoV-iiB?tab=summary&timestamp=1015.0)
  - [This requires an ongoing retooling process as the technology evolves](https://fathom.video/share/kFsStDpaaa6iJb7751SdBXL8nvoV-iiB?tab=summary&timestamp=1020.0)
  - [Simply buying AI tools is insufficient for full optimization](https://fathom.video/share/kFsStDpaaa6iJb7751SdBXL8nvoV-iiB?tab=summary&timestamp=598.0)

### Potential Use Cases

  - [John is more interested in revenue-generating use cases than just efficiency plays](https://fathom.video/share/kFsStDpaaa6iJb7751SdBXL8nvoV-iiB?tab=summary&timestamp=683.0)
  - [Possibilities discussed: post-call automation, case summarization, quality assurance, sentiment analysis](https://fathom.video/share/kFsStDpaaa6iJb7751SdBXL8nvoV-iiB?tab=summary&timestamp=643.0)
  - [Marcel believes their content marketing work stream is already providing strong ROI](https://fathom.video/share/kFsStDpaaa6iJb7751SdBXL8nvoV-iiB?tab=summary&timestamp=1057.0)

### Structuring the Engagement

  - [Marcel proposed starting with one additional work stream beyond content marketing](https://fathom.video/share/kFsStDpaaa6iJb7751SdBXL8nvoV-iiB?tab=summary&timestamp=1583.0)
  - [This would be a month-to-month engagement to start, avoiding long commitments](https://fathom.video/share/kFsStDpaaa6iJb7751SdBXL8nvoV-iiB?tab=summary&timestamp=1596.0)
  - [After a few months, they could explore a broader training/workshop for more people](https://fathom.video/share/kFsStDpaaa6iJb7751SdBXL8nvoV-iiB?tab=summary&timestamp=1617.0)
  - [John will discuss work stream priorities with Rishi and propose next steps](https://fathom.video/share/kFsStDpaaa6iJb7751SdBXL8nvoV-iiB?tab=summary&timestamp=1705.0)

## Next Steps

  - [John will summarize the discussion and proposed work stream options in a doc for Rishi](https://fathom.video/share/kFsStDpaaa6iJb7751SdBXL8nvoV-iiB?tab=summary&timestamp=1705.0)
  - [Marcel will make an intro to Rishi after John shares the doc](https://fathom.video/share/kFsStDpaaa6iJb7751SdBXL8nvoV-iiB?tab=summary&timestamp=1760.0)
  - [They will align on which additional work stream to start with for a few months](https://fathom.video/share/kFsStDpaaa6iJb7751SdBXL8nvoV-iiB?tab=summary&timestamp=1732.0)
  - [Potential to expand to more work streams and training after assessing initial engagement](https://fathom.video/share/kFsStDpaaa6iJb7751SdBXL8nvoV-iiB?tab=summary&timestamp=1740.0)
